response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform design, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang rather than C++ or cloud infrastructure leadership; there is no evidence of mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or owning cloud architecture projects as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical mentoring via workshops
Proven experience with distributed systems and high-performance applications
concerns: Only minimal C++ exposure (LabWindows/CVI role), far below 8-year requirement
No clear experience with cloud compute platforms, distributed systems at scale, or cloud architecture ownership
Lacks documented technical leadership in cloud/DevOps teams or mentoring roles as specified
